args:
Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Routing Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/trie-router/node.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts

- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and configures default router stack with SmartRouter containing RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions.
- Simple note: Default constructor uses SmartRouter wrapping [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter].

## src/hono-base.ts

- Purpose: Core Hono base class providing app.get/post/use/on/fetch/request methods and internal router integration.
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, getPath, mergePath, compose, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, RouterRoute.
- Simple note: Routes stored in routes array and router object. #dispatch calls router.match for request handling. Supports custom router injection.

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module exports PatternRouter class for regex-based pattern matching.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
- Simple note: Re-exports from ./router.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements regex-based routing with wildcard and optional parameter support using compiled RegEx patterns.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter.
- Simple note: add() compiles paths to RegEx with groups for params. match() iterates routes and executes matching patterns. Uses emptyParams fallback.

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module exports LinearRouter class for linear sequential routing with wildcard and named parameter support.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
- Simple note: Re-exports from ./router.

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements linear sequential route matching with special handling for wildcard (*) and named parameters (:name).
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, checkOptionalParameter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError.
- Simple note: match() loops through routes array. Handles static paths, wildcard paths, and named param paths separately. Throws UnsupportedPathError for hasLabel+hasStar combos.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module exports RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter for optimized regex-based routing.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
- Simple note: Re-exports from ./router and ./prepared-router.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements regex router using Trie for path indexing and generates combined regex for fast matching.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Matcher, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, match, emptyParam, PATH_ERROR, HandlerData, StaticMap.
- Simple note: add() builds internal structure (middleware, routes). match() delegates to external match() function that uses buildAllMatchers() to compile on first match.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts

- Purpose: Provides match function and type definitions for RegExpRouter matcher interface.
- Names noticed: match, emptyParam, ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap.
- Simple note: match() function builds matchers on first call then caches them. Returns [RegExp, HandlerData[], StaticMap].

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts

- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter for router serialization by building matchers upfront.
- Names notices: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, HandlerData, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
- Simple note: Takes pre-built matchers and relocateMap in constructor. add() updates existing matchers instead of rebuilding. Enables router sharing/serialization.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Node class for Trie structure representing path segments in RegExpRouter.
- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, PATH_ERROR, compareKey, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR.
- Simple note: insert() walks tokens and builds children trie. buildRegExpStr() generates regex from trie structure.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts

- Purpose: Trie class that builds regular expression from trie structure with handler indexes.
- Names noticed: Trie, ParamAssocArray, Context, ReplacementMap, Node, insert, buildRegExp.
- Simple note: insert() processes path with groups stripped. buildRegExp() creates regex with index and param replacement maps.

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module exports SmartRouter class for sequential router fallback strategy.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
- Simple note: Re-exports from ./router.

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter that tries routers sequentially and commits to first successful match.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT.
- Simple note: match() loops through routers. Catches UnsupportedPathError to try next. Commits active router via match binding and singletonization.

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module exports TrieRouter class for trie-based routing.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
- Simple note: Re-exports from ./router.

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements trie-based routing using Node class for tree structure search.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, checkOptionalParameter, Node.
- Simple note: add() inserts paths into Node trie. match() delegates to node.search(). Handles optional parameters via checkOptionalParameter.

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Node class implementing trie structure for path routing with method and pattern support.
- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, METHOD_NAME_ALL.
- Simple note: insert() walks path segments and builds children tree with method handlers. search() traverses trie and collects matching handlers with params.

## src/router/common.case.test.ts

- Purpose: Shared test suite for common router behaviors across all router implementations.
- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, Params, ParamIndexMap, Router, skip.
- Simple note: Parametrize tests over newRouter function. Skip tests via skip array with reason. Covers basic usage, reserved words, complex patterns, registration order, multi-match, duplicate params.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter with common cases and skip patterns for unsupported features.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest.
- Simple note: Skips Duplicate param name self, Trailing slash tests. Tests basic routing, reserved words, complex patterns, wildcard, registration order.

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter with skip patterns for unsupported complex features.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest.
- Simple note: Skips Multi match params per handler, Capture regex with trailing wildcard, Complex with {.*} regexp, Trailing slash. Tests basic routing, multi match errors, trailing slash handling.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter with skip for ambiguous and complex regex patterns.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, ParamStash.
- Simple note: Skips Duplicate param parent/child, Complex capturing group, Including slashes, Capture complex directories, Parameter with {.*}. Tests return type, unsupported errors for ambiguous paths.

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combination.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest.
- Simple note: Single test passing all common cases via SmartRouter delegation.

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter covering all common router cases.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest.
- Simple note: Passes all common tests. Covers basic usage, named paths, wildcards, regex, ALL methods, fallback, multi match.

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

- Purpose: Comprehensive tests for Node class in TrieRouter with individual test cases.
- Names noticed: Node, insert, search.
- Simple note: Tests root node, basic usage, named paths, wildcards, regex patterns, ALL methods, multi match with wildcards, sort order, duplicate params, star patterns, routing order.

## Cross-File Checklist

- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
